content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with all major sectors green — IT (+1.56%), Metal (+1.65%), Pharma (+1.23%), Realty (+1.34%) leading. India VIX down 3.86% to 18.95 indicating risk-on mood. Global cues supportive (Nasdaq +1.63%). Book is already 68% deployed with +0.55% session P&L; per deployment hysteresis, default disposition leans toward managing existing book rather than aggressive new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.00,
      "new_target": 85.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 results (+27% PAT, GNPA 1.45%, CASA 52.5%) confirm thesis. Stock at 77.90 with PSU bank momentum intact. Tightening SL from 74.50 to 76.00 to reduce risk while keeping room above support1 (78.36) — wait, 76 is below S1 which is fine. Per-position risk: ~10% size × 2.4% SL = 0.24% portfolio risk, within budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +6.9% — trailing mandate triggered (>4% gain). Current SL 1031.11 is already above entry. Actually current SL of 1031.11 is reasonable lock-in (~5% above entry, ~2% below CMP 1051.80). Keeping SL — no-op MODIFY check: current 1031.11, proposed 1015 would be LOOSENING which is rejected. Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Flat P&L, defensive hedge against any market reversal. SL 119 (~5% below entry) is appropriate for low-vol gold ETF. Hold for portfolio diversification."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat (+27% PAT, +22% revenue), fresh 52w high at 1430. Position at +1.6%. Tightening SL from 1410 to 1418 (just above entry 1412.94 — locking in breakeven+) per trailing mandate. SL distance ~1.2%, target +4.1%, R:R ~3.4x."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results TODAY at board meeting + 6PM IST call — binary event. Current SL 1049.05 = entry (breakeven). CMP 1065.65, position +0.8%. Will not tighten further pre-event to avoid being whipsawed by pre-results volatility; SL at breakeven is appropriate for binary catalyst day. Reassess post-results."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 685.00,
      "new_target": 725.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.4%, results Apr 29 (2 days away). Trailing SL from 681 (entry) up to 685 to lock breakeven+. CMP 697.50, SL distance ~1.8%. Pre-earnings event risk acknowledged but momentum strong (52w high zone). Tight SL appropriate for binary event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.1%, Q4 results Apr 30 (3 days). Stock recovered from session lows; CMP 2327, intraday print 2345.50. SL 2260 (~4.7% below entry) is appropriate width for binary FMCG print. Holding into results — thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 396.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3%, near 52w high (407.25). Tightening SL from 393 to 396 (just below S1 396.65) to reduce risk on this moderate-conviction defensive name. Q4 results May 15. SL distance ~2.5%, target ~5%, R:R ~2x."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL closer to S2 (76.95) — strong Q4 thesis intact, but reduce loss potential."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1031 (above entry, ~2% below CMP) — strong trail already in place."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF position — keep as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in breakeven+ after fresh 52w high; tight SL given premium valuation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Earnings TODAY — keep SL at entry (breakeven), no pre-event tightening to avoid whipsaw."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 685.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail above entry pre-results (Apr 29). Limit downside on binary event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pre-earnings (Apr 30); recovering. SL at 2260 gives appropriate room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 396.00,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high; tighten SL to lock breakeven+ ahead of May 15 results."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GLENMARK at ATH + pharma sector leader — momentum strong but extension risk on 4-day rally; would consider on pullback to 2250-2270 zone. IPCALAB constructive setup but premium valuation; wait for Q4 results June 3. ANANTRAJ AVOID — ED raid overhang, sentiment bearish, regulatory tail risk. INDUSINDBK strong earnings but already had 6% gap-up — chase risk. SUNPHARMA digesting Organon deal, monitor for base. IDBI privatisation narrative interesting but execution risk; pass for now. AMC volume surges (UTIAMC, ABSLAMC) need fundamental confirmation.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 68% deployed with 8 positions — diversified across PSU bank, HFC, FMCG (2), private bank, gold ETF, pharma, energy. Three positions have binary earnings events in next 3 days (AUBANK today, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30) — significant event-cluster risk. NO new entries today: deployment hysteresis active, multiple binary events pending, and 5-day track record (1W/1L of 17 trades) shows execution still finding its footing. Focus is exclusively on tightening SLs to lock in unrealized gains before earnings volatility. Cash buffer of 32% preserved as event-risk insurance. If AUBANK results disappoint after-hours, expect gap-down — SL at breakeven mitigates but doesn't eliminate gap risk."
}
